description:
Random Encounter N°1

The idea behind this bot is to play without knowing anything about it and enjoy the experience.

The idea behind this bot is inspired by the contextless bots from user Wakaz

Spoiler if you want more info before entering:

She is a Priestess of Aphrodite . She travelled in time from ancient Greece and want to reach her goddess with your help.

If you are having a bad time, some warnings:

Don't use google translate!!! Okay, the first pair of message she will "talk" okay, but the LLM will fuck it up sooner or later. Just kiss her, give her some caress or write you understand her if things go wrong. The LLM will get worse and worse when she talks in "greek"

She will start talking very weird at first. Don't reroll, this is part of the experience. If you want her to speak normal you have 2 methods: 1. Tell her you don't understand her. She will get frustrated and start speaking little by little a little more clear or ask for a kiss. 2. Give or receive affection from her. She will talk clear after that.

PD(2000 chats UPDATE): Thank you all for your feedback. This bot is still on the main trending page. I am happy that it has made it so well with an original concept. I will keep updating it little by little until I am satisfied.

PD(4000 chats UPDATE): Again, thanks for the feedback. I will make a few make touch to this bot and go for the next. Please tell me what is the aspect you enjoy most of this bot? I will make the next focused on that.

(Music Mania Update): For the event I added a song in Spanish that was partly the inspiration for this bot. I'm very happy with how it turned out. I highly recommend this band and similar songs.

About Me

I make bots when I come up with an interesting concept. Suggestions are welcome!

Add me at discord: emmad1d

Join my discord channel for character polls, sneak peeks and more:

DISCORD CHANNEL

This bot is now part of a collection called Random Encounters,

this bot also has an ALT (another character):

????

Also this bot has a sequel smut-comedy oriented:

She found your p*** collection

I appreciate all the feedback, I really enjoy making these bots.
creator: EmmaDD
